\section{Summary}

Data Analyst with 2+ years at ADP --- built Customer Feedback Intelligence System processing 80K--100K records/day (85\% sentiment accuracy, 50\%+ reduction in manual tagging) and surfaced the payment failure insight that drove a 20\% complaint reduction; open to EU Blue Card sponsorship.

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{Data Analyst}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Jun 2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected Customer Feedback Intelligence System ingesting 80K--100K records daily from support tickets, app reviews, and chatbot logs; designed incremental pipeline for continuous enrichment without full reprocessing, eliminating overnight batch delays.
  \item Surfaced payment failures as the top driver of negative sentiment through cohort analysis; insight directly informed Q3 product prioritization and led to targeted engineering fixes that reduced payment-related complaints by 20\%.
  \item Engineered OpenAI-powered sentiment classification pipeline achieving 85\% accuracy on nuanced complaint categories --- replacing rule-based NLP (Natural Language Processing) models and cutting manual tagging effort by 50\%+, enabling automated processing of the full daily corpus.
  \item Delivered Tableau dashboards --- sentiment trends, volume by category, and issue drill-downs --- used daily by 40+ stakeholders across product and ops teams, aligning cross-functional priorities and enabling data-driven sprint decisions.
  \item Designed PostgreSQL schema for raw and enriched feedback; wrote SQL aggregations surfacing top complaint categories, sentiment distribution, and trend time-series; applied strategic indexing that reduced dashboard query load times for 40+ daily users.
  \item Built end-to-end Python orchestration layer for text preprocessing, OpenAI API calls, structured output parsing, and PostgreSQL ingestion; pipeline ran on a daily schedule with zero manual intervention across 100K+ records.
\end{itemize}

\entry{AI Engineer \& Software Engineer}{ADP}{Jul 2024 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected LLM/RAG risk detection system processing 10K+ audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records --- flagging time fraud, tax miscalculations, and duplicate payments --- reducing manual audit effort by 40\%.
  \item Built RAG compliance pipeline ingesting IRS codes and state labor laws alongside structured payroll data; automated regulatory cross-referencing and generated audit trails for every flagged case.
  \item Designed React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards for real-time risk visualization; improved Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds and page performance by 35\%.
  \item Deployed on AWS (Lambda, Step Functions, DynamoDB, RDS, Glue) and Pivotal Cloud Foundry; cut infrastructure costs 40\% and maintained 99.9\%+ availability.
\end{itemize}

% ── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Projects}

\entry{Job Tailor}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder}{github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://jobtailor.in/}{jobtailor.in}}{2025 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Shipped data-driven job search platform ingesting real-time listings from Naukri, Indeed India, Internshala, and Adzuna/RemoteOK; applies AI match-scoring with score breakdown, supporting sort, filter, pin, and bulk actions.
  \item Designed PostgreSQL (Supabase) schema for multi-source job data with Prisma v5 ORM; implemented keyword gap analysis pipeline comparing candidate profiles to JD requirements.
  \item Built full-stack on Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, NextAuth.js; deployed on Vercel with CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Keen --- AI Due Diligence Platform}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/keen}{github.com/lohith261/keen} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://keen-sigma.vercel.app/}{keen-sigma.vercel.app}}{2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected multi-agent due diligence automation platform for PE firms --- research agents integrate Salesforce, NetSuite, SEC EDGAR, HubSpot, and Crunchbase; TinyFish browser automation accesses locked platforms (Bloomberg, LinkedIn, SAP) with real-time pipeline monitoring and pause/resume without progress loss.
  \item Engineered Claude AI analysis layer that cross-references aggregated business data to surface revenue mismatches, audit red flags, and risk discrepancies; exports reports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: React/TypeScript (Vercel) + Python 3.11 (Fly.io) + Supabase + Redis.
\end{itemize}
